pp-model-raw.raw-yaml:
type: object
required:
    - condition_id
    - name
    - confidence
    - severity
    - zone
properties:
    condition_id:
        type: string
    name:
        type: string
        example: Post-Inflammatory Hyperpigmentation (PIH)
    confidence:
        type: number
        minimum: 0
        maximum: 1
    severity:
        type: string
        enum:
            - mild
            - moderate
            - severe
    features:
        type: array
        items:
            type: string
    zone:
        type: string
        example: cheek-left

model.name: DetectedCondition
model.rawYaml:
type: object
required:
    - condition_id
    - name
    - confidence
    - severity
    - zone
properties:
    condition_id:
        type: string
    name:
        type: string
        example: Post-Inflammatory Hyperpigmentation (PIH)
    confidence:
        type: number
        minimum: 0
        maximum: 1
    severity:
        type: string
        enum:
            - mild
            - moderate
            - severe
    features:
        type: array
        items:
            type: string
    zone:
        type: string
        example: cheek-left
